mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", shipping_method as "shippingMethod", state_id as "stateId", delivery_attempts as "deliveryAttempts", estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", current_location as "currentLocation", from_address as "fromAddress", to_address as "toAddress", weight, dimensions, delivery_instructions as "deliveryInstructions", created_time as "createdAt" FROM shipments WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM shipments GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", shipping_method as "shippingMethod", state_id as "stateId", current_location as "currentLocation", created_time as "createdAt" FROM shipments WHERE carrier = #{carrier} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", shipping_method as "shippingMethod", state_id as "stateId", current_location as "currentLocation", created_time as "createdAt" FROM shipments WHERE state_id IN ('PENDING', 'LABEL_CREATED') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM shipments WHERE state_id IN ('PENDING', 'LABEL_CREATED')

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", shipping_method as "shippingMethod", state_id as "stateId", estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", current_location as "currentLocation" FROM shipments WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", shipping_method as "shippingMethod", state_id as "stateId", estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", current_location as "currentLocation", delivery_attempts as "deliveryAttempts" FROM shipments WHERE tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}
